title: Update installation instructions + landing page for Docs

body:
This PR:
 - Adds a function, `precompile_atmos` to precompile `step!` and all callbacks. This should improve our understanding of the log in that the reported timings will be mostly runtime, and exclude compiletime.
 - Adds a function `call_all_callbacks!` (called by `precompile_atmos`), closes #1823.
title: Add function to call callbacks and precompile

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
I decided to add the diffusive flux first as I'm a bit stuck on the mixing length. We need this to test the mixing length anyway so I think it would be good to have. We can also have surface flux with edmfx after this change, without turning on vertical diffusion. The bomex result doesn't look good because I am using a constant diffusivity, but it should look better once we switch to the more physical diffusivity.

Closes #1840

title: add diffusive flux for edmfx
